input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.5.7.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.5.7.2
            TITLE: all fuel lines must be shielded from possible rotating equipment failure or collision damage.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.5.7.2: All fuel lines must be shielded from possible rotating equipment failure or collision damage.
IC.5.7.2 All fuel lines must be shielded from possible rotating equipment failure or collision damage.

final_answer: All fuel lines must be shielded from possible rotating equipment failure or collision damage.
